steps: Go to https://app.box.com/developers/console (log in or create a free Box account first)
Select 'Custom App' as the app type
Fill in the App Name, Description, Purpose, and Category
Select 'User Authentication (OAuth 2.0)' as the authentication method and click 'Create App'
In your app's Configuration tab, scroll down to 'OAuth 2.0 Credentials' to find your Client ID and Client Secret
Under 'OAuth 2.0 Redirect URI', add your redirect URI (e.g., http://localhost:3000/callback)

credential_fields.name: client_id
credential_fields.label: Client ID
credential_fields.description: Your Box OAuth 2.0 application Client ID

credential_fields.name: client_secret
credential_fields.label: Client Secret
credential_fields.description: Your Box OAuth 2.0 application Client Secret

notes: Free Box developer account available at https://developer.box.com
OAuth 2.0 requires users to authorize your app through a browser-based consent screen
Access tokens expire after 1 hour; use the refresh token to obtain new ones
Sandbox apps have some feature restrictions compared to production apps
App must be submitted for review before it can be used by users outside your enterprise

test_endpoint.description: Returns the currently authenticated user's profile information
